coach_notes: For the Field Technical Support and Technical Solutions Analyst roles, SQL and Python are critical for querying databases and automating support tasks, while documentation skills are essential for the Junior Technical Writer position. JavaScript and testing knowledge would also strengthen your candidacy for the Technical Solutions Analyst role, as these are commonly required for troubleshooting web-based banking solutions. Focus on learning SQL and Python first, as they appear across multiple job descriptions and are foundational for technical support and analysis.

jobs.title: Field Technical Support
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong match with technical troubleshooting, debugging, and communication skills. Experience in operations and inventory management supports field support role.
jobs.gaps: No specific field experience or advanced technical certifications mentioned.

jobs.title: Junior Technical Writer for Banking Solutions (m/f/d)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Excellent communication and bilingual skills (English/Spanish) are valuable for writing. Organizational skills and attention to detail support documentation tasks.
jobs.gaps: No experience in technical writing, banking domain knowledge, or familiarity with documentation tools.

jobs.title: US- Technical Solutions Analyst
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Technical troubleshooting, debugging, and operations skills align with analyst role. Bilingual abilities and teamwork are assets.
jobs.gaps: No healthcare IT experience or specific knowledge of point-of-care systems. May need additional training on industry-specific software.

jobs.title: 2026 Fall Information Systems Intern/Co-Op
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Organizational skills, teamwork, and basic technical skills are relevant for an internship. Bilingualism and adaptability are pluses.
jobs.gaps: No information systems coursework or project experience. High school diploma only; may need to pursue relevant degree or certifications.

jobs.title: Network Support Internship
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Basic technical troubleshooting and debugging skills provide a foundation. Communication and teamwork are beneficial.
jobs.gaps: No network-specific knowledge, certifications (e.g., CCNA), or hands-on experience with network equipment. Significant learning curve.
